title: Jewelry/Accessory Designer for Signature Bracelet
brief: Seeking an experienced jewelry or fashion accessory designer to help create the signature bracelet for a new lifestyle and cultural brand centered on gathering, celebration, connection, and memorable experiences. The bracelet is intended to become a recognizable brand object—similar to how certain brands are known for a specific bracelet, charm, watch, or collectible item. It must feel elevated, meaningful, wearable, and timeless while remaining practical for everyday use and special occasions. Looking for a designer with experience taking products from concept through manufacturing, including materials, closures, technical specifications, prototyping, and factory coordination. Strong preference for candidates who have designed bracelets, premium accessories, lifestyle products, or collectible consumer goods that successfully reached production and preserved strong emotional and brand value.
